name: Automated Scoring of Communication Skills in Physician-Patient Interaction: Balancing Performance and Scalability
venue: Proceedings of the 20th Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA 2025)
summary: BEA 2025 paper on automated scoring for a formative communication-skills tool for learner physicians. The study evaluates Qwen-generated synthetic learner responses for training augmentation and explicitly preserves real learner responses for evaluation, with ethical discussion separating formative use from summative human-review workflows.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology metadata, abstract, DOI, citation, and PDF link verified.
PDF downloaded and text extracted locally.
